changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-store/src/handle.rs:957-993

The flush_changes tests (flush_changes_detects_external_create, flush_changes_detects_external_change, flush_changes_detects_external_remove) verify event_name and payload["id"] but never assert on payload["store"]. The store_name enrichment is the critical new feature of this branch, yet no test verifies the store name flows through correctly.

The MockStore in tests uses the default store_name() implementation which infers from the directory basename. If the store root is "/tmp/.tmpXXXXX/store1", store_name() returns "store1". But no test asserts this value.

Suggestion: Add assertions like `assert_eq!(events[0].payload["store"], "store1")` to each flush_changes test. Also add a test with a custom store_name() override to verify the EntityTypeStore path.",
<parameter name="tags">["review-finding"]
WARNING: No test verifying store_name appears in flush_changes event payloads
